'''''Star Bantha''''' was one of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bulk freighter/Legends|bulk freighters]] assigned to [[Imperial Replenishment Fleet DK-209/Legends|Imperial Replenishment Fleet DK-209]].

==Appearances==
*[[Black Ice (adventure)|''Black Ice'']]
